subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the Kingdom of God! Every soul seeketh an object and cherisheth a desire,
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بملکوت الله هر نفسی را فکری و مقصدی شب و روز در تحصیل مقصود میکوشد
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual foundations of true knowledge, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
